description: Level-1.0090, “Memory Museum” is a sub-level of Level-0 located right above said level. It is a massive and expansive complex of tall, wide spaces with green, patterened wallpaper walls and tan wooden floors. The level is divided into several layers and certain parts of the level can only be accessed with constructive aid from E&L or BPJ personnel. The ceiling consists of white ceiling tiles fitted with calm, dimly-yellow lights.
